column1: # End-to-end verification that the new entries in l123-parse's rename
# table evaluate correctly through parse → engine → display.
# Seed A1..A5 = 1..5 — the input range for AVG/VARS/etc.
# @COUNT → COUNTA: counts non-empty cells incl. labels. Drop a label
# at A6 first; then COUNT A1..A6 = 6.
# Niladic: @PI evaluates without explicit parens. The value is
# irrational; assert the formula source on the panel rather than the
# rendered cell text (which depends on column width).
# @@ → INDIRECT. Put the literal text "A6" in C1, then @@(C1) at D1
# resolves to A6's value ("hello"). The label flows naturally because
# @D360 → DAYS360: days between two dates on a 360-day-year basis.
# @DGET → DGET: extract a single value from a database where criteria
# matches. Database in F1..G3 (header row + two records); criteria in
# @ISRANGE → ISREF. ISREF returns a Bool; the renderer paints it as
# that's a separate cleanup that affects every IS* function.
